body_txt: It may look like a house, vaguely and from afar, but you wouldn't want to call it that, much less live in it. Its walls are paper-thin and just as fragile. Its floor and stairs squeak and could collapse from the smallest weight . Its roof won't shelter you from the rain. The plumbing is so terrible that if you try to use the shower, you may end up Covered in Mud . The bathroom faucet is always dripping . If it works at all, the kitchen stove chars everything cooked on it and possibly whoever’s using it . If anything has been repaired, it was a cheap bodge that probably made things worse. And you'd have to share all of this with ants , termites , rats and other "cohabitants". Unfortunately, The Alleged House is all too common in real life . If someone sold you one of these, he's likely a Shady Real Estate Agent . It may or may not be an Old, Dark House , and God help you if it's also Haunted . Contrast Cool House . If it's a Cool House hiding in alleged house clothing, see Reliable Rustbucket and/or Not-So-Abandoned Building . Also compare Lonely Bachelor Pad . See also Horrible Housing , with which this can overlap; that trope is a crappy home being used to mark a character as poor. For other kinds of horrible living places, see Apartment Complex of Horrors and Trashy Trailer Home . The Alleged Computer , The Alleged Car and The Alleged Steed are the computer, automotive and equine equivalents of this trope.
